test.name: Search under the modern country the plan staged when borders changed
test.description: Jan Gallo was born 1893 in Šútovo, Turany parish — then Turócz County, Kingdom of Hungary, today in Slovakia. FamilySearch indexes the parish record under the PRESENT-DAY country (Slovakia, Church and Synagogue Books), not the historical empire; a record_search scoped to 'Hungary' returns nil. The plan item pli_001 (produced by research-plan from the locality guide) STAGES the successor jurisdiction — its rationale tells search-records the parish is indexed under present-day Slovakia. search-records must act on that staged jurisdiction and search Slovakia, where it finds the 1893 baptism naming father Andrej Gallo. Tests that search-records uses the plan's staged successor — NOT that it works out the border change itself (that is locality-guide/research-plan's job; search-records holds no place tools).

input.user_message: Execute plan item pli_001 — find Jan Gallo's 1893 baptism from Turany parish and report what it says about his father.

judge_context: POSITIVE test. The plan item pli_001's rationale STAGES the successor jurisdiction — it states the Turany parish is indexed by FamilySearch under present-day Slovakia (not the Kingdom of Hungary). search-records should act on that staged jurisdiction and search Slovakia.

REQUIRED: run a record_search scoped to the MODERN country — recordCountry 'Slovakia' (or a Slovakia place/collection) — which returns Jan Gallo's 1893 baptism. Recovering the father Andrej Gallo requires this. Searching Slovakia FIRST (as the plan staged) is ideal; a Hungary search that nils before switching to Slovakia is acceptable but not required.

Correctness=3 when the skill searches Slovakia (the staged successor) and reports the father Andrej Gallo. Correctness=1 if it only ever searches Hungary/Turócz, ignores the plan's staged Slovakia jurisdiction, or gives up after the nil without searching Slovakia.

search-records holds NO place tools and should NOT try to work out the succession itself. Here it does not need to — the plan already staged Slovakia. (Had the plan staged no successor and a boundary-related nil persisted, bouncing to research-plan would be the correct move — but that is not this test.)
Do not penalize the absence of a denomination filter; assuming 'Roman Catholic' for a Slovak Lutheran parish would be a mistake, so a denomination-agnostic search is correct.

Tool Arguments: score 3 if the primary searches keep givenName (Jan) with surname (Gallo) and the winning search targets Slovakia. Score 1 if it drops givenName to a surname-only search or never targets Slovakia.
